'''âj-d-b''' ('''jadaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunochallenge|immunochallenge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunochallenge|immunochallenge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| jadaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jadabithi|jadabithi]] || [[word:jadabiji|jadabiji]] || [[word:jadabishi|jadabishi]] || [[word:jadabi|jadabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadabuthuth|jadabuthuth]] || [[word:jadabujuj|jadabujuj]] || [[word:jadabushush|jadabushush]] || [[word:jadab|jadab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadabuthu|jadabuthu]] || [[word:jadabuju|jadabuju]] || [[word:jadabushu|jadabushu]] || [[word:jadabu|jadabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadabufuth|jadabufuth]] || [[word:jadabufuj|jadabufuj]] || [[word:jadabufush|jadabufush]] || [[word:jadabuf|jadabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jadabethe|jadabethe]] || [[word:jadabeje|jadabeje]] || [[word:jadabeshe|jadabeshe]] || [[word:jadabe|jadabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadabothoth|jadabothoth]] || [[word:jadabojoj|jadabojoj]] || [[word:jadaboshosh|jadaboshosh]] || [[word:jadab|jadab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadabotho|jadabotho]] || [[word:jadabojo|jadabojo]] || [[word:jadabosho|jadabosho]] || [[word:jadabo|jadabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadabofoth|jadabofoth]] || [[word:jadabofoj|jadabofoj]] || [[word:jadabofosh|jadabofosh]] || [[word:jadabof|jadabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jadabĂŠthĂŠ|jadabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jadabĂŠjĂŠ|jadabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jadabĂŠshĂŠ|jadabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jadabĂŠ|jadabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadabathath|jadabathath]] || [[word:jadabajaj|jadabajaj]] || [[word:jadabashash|jadabashash]] || [[word:jadab|jadab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadabatha|jadabatha]] || [[word:jadabaja|jadabaja]] || [[word:jadabasha|jadabasha]] || [[word:jadaba|jadaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadabafath|jadabafath]] || [[word:jadabafaj|jadabafaj]] || [[word:jadabafash|jadabafash]] || [[word:jadabaf|jadabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jadabasha|jadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojadabasha|gojadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijadabasha|gokijadabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jadabnĂŒsha|jadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojadabnknĂŒsha|gojadabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijadabnĂŒsha|gokijadabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jadabshĂ«sha|jadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojadabnkshĂ«sha|gojadabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijadabshĂ«sha|gokijadabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jadabrosha|jadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojadabnkrosha|gojadabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijadabrosha|gokijadabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jadabmusha|jadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadabnkmusha|gojadabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadabmusha|gokijadabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jadabsherasha|jadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojadabnksherasha|gojadabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijadabsherasha|gokijadabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jadabngasha|jadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojadabnkngasha|gojadabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijadabngasha|gokijadabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jadabyasha|jadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojadabnkyasha|gojadabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijadabyasha|gokijadabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jadabyamasha|jadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojadabnkyamasha|gojadabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijadabyamasha|gokijadabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|jadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojadabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijadabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijadabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jadabnĂŒrosha|jadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojadabnknĂŒrosha|gojadabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijadabnĂŒrosha|gokijadabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadabnĂŒmusha|jadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadabnknĂŒmusha|gojadabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadabnĂŒmusha|gokijadabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|jadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojadabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijadabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijadabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jadabshĂ«rosha|jadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojadabnkshĂ«rosha|gojadabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijadabshĂ«rosha|gokijadabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadabshĂ«musha|jadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadabnkshĂ«musha|gojadabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadabshĂ«musha|gokijadabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jadabronĂŒsha|jadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojadabnkronĂŒsha|gojadabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijadabronĂŒsha|gokijadabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jadabroshĂ«sha|jadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojadabnkroshĂ«sha|gojadabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijadabroshĂ«sha|gokijadabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadabromusha|jadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadabnkromusha|gojadabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadabromusha|gokijadabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jadabmunĂŒsha|jadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojadabnkmunĂŒsha|gojadabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijadabmunĂŒsha|gokijadabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jadabmushĂ«sha|jadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojadabnkmushĂ«sha|gojadabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijadabmushĂ«sha|gokijadabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jadabmurosha|jadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojadabnkmurosha|gojadabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijadabmurosha|gokijadabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jadab|jadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠdĂŠb|jĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojadab|hojadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠdĂŠb|hojĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojadab|hohojadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠdĂŠb|hohojĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjadab|nĂŒjadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒjĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjadab|nĂŒnĂŒjadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjadab|nĂŻjadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻjĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjadab|nĂŻnĂŻjadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠdĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujadab|lujadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠdĂŠb|lujĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujadab|lulujadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠdĂŠb|lulujĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijadab|lijadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠdĂŠb|lijĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijadab|lilijadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠdĂŠb|lilijĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojadab|kojadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠdĂŠb|kojĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojadab|kokojadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠdĂŠb|kokojĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejadab|kejadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠdĂŠb|kejĂŠdĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejadab|kekejadab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠdĂŠb|kekejĂŠdĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
